'''Syron Aalun''' was a [[Gender/Legends|male]] [[Gand/Legends|Gand]] [[ruetsavii]]—commonly known as observers—sent to monitor [[Rogue Squadron/Legends|Rogue Squadron]] [[Pilot/Legends|pilot]] [[Ooryl Qrygg]] during the [[Bacta War]]. Along with fellow ruetsavii [[Ussar Vlee]] and [[Vviir Wiamdi]], their task was to determine Qrygg's worthiness to become ''[[janwuine]]'', the status in Gand society which allowed one to speak of oneself in the first person. In accordance with their duties, Aalun and his companions participated in a few missions with Rogue Squadron and their allies during the Bacta War to better gauge Qrygg's skills, using a type of [[Gand starfighter]] that was essentially a heavily-modified [[TIE/sa tactical bomber/Legends|TIE/sa bomber]].<ref name="X:Bacta" />
